chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 1245 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.26. 2. For orders on CMA No.2961/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 17.09.2025 This reference is pending since 2023 without any progress. Even notice has not been issued / sought till date. On the last date, applicant remained unrepresented and same is the case today. It appears that the applicant, Commissioner Inland Revenue (Zone-III) LTO, is not interested in proceeding with this matter, therefore, same is dismissed for non- prosecution. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
